calendar.matters:
Order To Show Cause Re: Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Jun-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kevin Eikenberry, Esq. (925-933-2161) for Plaintiff/moving party Suerte Holdings, LLC.
Edwar Smith, Esq. (415-421-3400) for Third party/Opposing party Saxe & Dakota Note.
Kay Brugnara (415-505-8869) Defendant/Opposing party in Pro Per.

The Court announces the Tentative ruling. Both sides ARGUED. Plaintiff argues separate judicial lien and execution lien. Third party Argues the owner of the house is not a judgment debtor. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Order To Show Cause Re: Sale Of Real Property. Request for continuance and the request for an order directing sale of dwelling is denied. Denied with Prejudice. Order is signed in Open Court. (see scanned order for details) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Order To Show Cause Re: Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar May-03-2016 Continued To Jun-08-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Order To Show Cause Re: Sale Of Real Property

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Continued to June 8, 2016, to allow the court in Santa Clara County to hear and decide its motion for an order adding Brungnara Properties VI to the judgment as an additional judgment debtor. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501)

Order To Show Cause Re: Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Mar-03-2016 Continued To May-03-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Order To Show Cause Re: Sale Of Real Property is continued to May 3, 2016. The Court finds good cause for continuance per moving party's request and in light of the hearing in Santa Clara county on March 29, 2016. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
